title: Paraboea strobilacea
taxonomy: Paraboea strobilacea is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This family is commonly known as the "African violet family". The species Paraboea strobilacea is native to Africa. It is further classified as a member of the genus Paraboea, which is a group of flowering plants. The classification of Paraboea strobilacea is based on its unique characteristics and features.
